title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: She finally found the answer to the puzzle.

questions.firstSentence: The company had introduced a new policy the previous year.
questions.secondSentence: A new policy had (1) _________ the previous year.

questions.firstSentence: He is too short to ride the biggest roller coaster.
questions.secondSentence: He isn't (1) _________ to ride the biggest roller coaster.

questions.firstSentence: She kept the job offer a secret from everyone.
I regret not buying that house when I had the chance.
questions.secondSentence: I (1) _________ that house when I had the chance.

questions.firstSentence: He was obliged to cancel his holiday due to work.
questions.secondSentence: He (1) _________ his holiday due to work.

questions.firstSentence: The journalist said to the mayor, 'Please explain the decision.'
